sections.description: Prayer Management System with a modern prayer wall, frontend submission modal, admin moderation tools, email settings, and performance improvements.
sections.changelog:
3.0.1

  • Redesigned the Prayer Wall into a unified dashboard interface.
  • Added tabbed sections for Prayer Wall, Pending Requests, General Settings, and Email Settings.
  • Integrated frontend prayer request submission into a modal for a cleaner user experience.
  • Added admin-only moderation tools directly inside the Prayer Wall dashboard.
  • Added approve and remove actions for pending prayer requests.
  • Added Prayer of the Day display with citation and feed caching.
  • Added styling controls for prayer titles, prayer text, Prayer of the Day title, and Prayer of the Day body.
  • Added support for anonymous prayer request display.
  • Added support for optional private prayer requests.
  • Improved frontend pagination handling across Prayer Wall tabs.
  • Added performed-prayer tracking table to better manage unique prayer interactions.
  • Improved prayer count handling and prayed-state tracking per visitor/user.
  • Optimized plugin update checks by caching the remote manifest response.
  • Moved default option setup to activation/upgrade routines instead of running on every request.
  • Improved cache invalidation using cache versioning instead of wildcard transient deletion queries.
  • Limited frontend asset loading to pages where the Prayer Wall shortcode is present.
  • Added AJAX nonce validation for prayer, approve, and delete actions.
  • Added basic AJAX rate limiting for prayer actions.
  • Improved shortcode output structure and overall frontend organization.
  • Improved admin settings access from the plugin action links.
  • General code cleanup, stability improvements, and performance optimizations.
